generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how our allies are falling short on defense spending. While we're carrying the burden, our commitment to mutual defense is being tested. Studies show that only 3 of our 30 allies meet the 2% GDP defense spending target. This isn't about being tough on allies—it's about ensuring our own security. We need to reinforce our commitment while pushing for fair burden-sharing. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
